data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. Acceptance criterion 3 is still violated: successful background session exits call invalidateBeatListQueries from src/lib/session-connection-manager.ts, and src/lib/beat-query-cache.ts refetches active observers immediately with refetchType="active", so non-user-initiated events do not remain on the 10-second cadence. 2. Acceptance criteria 4 and 5 are unmet: the repo has no executable Playwright spec covering beat refresh latency or network monitoring verification; rg only found the static notes file playwright-beats-queues.md. 3. User-initiated create/update invalidation paths do exist, but the step cannot be approved while the background invalidation path and required automated/browser verification are missing. 4. Sanity gates during this review: bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed; bun run lint did not finish cleanly from this checkout because eslint traversed generated .worktrees/.../.next artifacts, so lint remains unverified.
